home.title: 2nd Year Software Development Student | Back End Developer | Front End Developer
home.text:
👋 Hi, I'm Kevin Maximiliano Palma Romero, a passionate developer from Argentina.

💻 I love learning, coding, and solving problems, always with discipline, attention to detail, and teamwork.

❤️ Beyond technology, I enjoy anime, video games, reading, and staying active through training. These little moments also inspire me!
home.subtitle: Tools

project1.title: Dog Grooming
project1.description:
• Develop an application for managing a dog grooming service.
• Implement functionalities to register, view, edit, and delete information about dogs and their owners.
• Design a user-friendly and intuitive graphical interface using Swing.
• Ensure code quality by applying good practices and development standards.

project2.title: Book Finder
project2.description:
• Implement an efficient and functional book search engine.
• Integrate the Gutendex API to retrieve book data.
• Design an architecture based on patterns such as model, repository, and service.
• Manage a PostgreSQL database to store and query information.

project3.title: Currency Converter
project3.description:
• Create a currency converter with Java.
• Handle the ExchangeRate-API.
• Use packages, libraries, and imports.
• Error handling.

project4.title: Text Encryptor
project4.description:
• Create an encryptor using JavaScript.
• Create a decryptor using JavaScript.
• Implement the design made in Figma into code using HTML and CSS.
• Create a responsive design for different screen resolutions.

project5.title: Food Store
project5.description:
• Design and structure web pages using HTML.
• Style and format with CSS to ensure an attractive and functional user experience.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Committed to Innovation and Growth
about.text:
💡 Currently in the second year of a Higher Technician in Software Development program. My goal is to make my way into the programming world, applying both technical knowledge and interpersonal skills that enhance the projects I participate in.

🌱 I have a solid technical foundation in HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, Java, Spring, PostgreSQL, and MySQL. I also have experience using Git, GitHub, Notion, Jira, and Trello, allowing me to collaborate in an organized and agile manner in any environment.

🤝 I consider myself a team player with key skills in time and resource management. I strive to communicate clearly, listen actively, and apply critical thinking focused on solutions. Moreover, I maintain a strong commitment to professional ethics, effective negotiation, and adaptability in changing environments.

🌐 I'm a native Spanish speaker and have an upper-intermediate level (B2) in English, enabling me to participate in international projects and continue learning from global sources.

💻 My goal is to keep growing as a programmer and add value to every challenge I face, combining a passion for technology with human skills that make a difference.

🚀 I'm ready to take the next step in my career and join teams that positively impact the industry.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: 📧 If you're looking for someone with solid technical skills, a continuous learning mindset, and dedication to exceeding expectations, don't hesitate to contact me. I'm ready to join your team and contribute to your company's growth!

footer.text: ⌨️ with ❤️ by Kevin Maximiliano Palma Romero | 2025
